languages.text: "Отвечай мне, машинный дух генетического стража. Кто такой Себериан?"
"Answer me, machine spirit of the genetic guardian. Who is Seberian?"
languages.original_text: "Отвечай мне, машинный дух генетического стража. Кто такой Себериан?"

traits.locale_text: "Answer me, machine spirit of the genetic guardian. Who is Seberian?"
"Answer me, machine spirit of the genetic guardian. Who is Seberian?"
"Answer me, machine spirit of the genetic guardian. Who is Seberian?"

languages.text: «Responde, espíritu máquina del guardián genético. ¿Quién es Seberian?».
languages.original_text: "Answer me, machine spirit of the genetic guardian. Who is Seberian?"

traits.locale_text: «Responde, espíritu máquina del guardián genético. ¿Quién es Seberian?».

languages.text: “回答我，基因守卫的机魂。塞贝里安是谁？”
languages.original_text: "Answer me, machine spirit of the genetic guardian. Who is Seberian?"

traits.locale_text: “回答我，基因守卫的机魂。塞贝里安是谁？”

languages.text: « Réponds-moi, esprit de la machine du gardien génétique. Qui est Seberian ? »
languages.original_text: "Answer me, machine spirit of the genetic guardian. Who is Seberian?"

traits.locale_text: « Réponds-moi, esprit de la machine du gardien génétique. Qui est Seberian ? »

languages.text: "Cevap ver genetik muhafızın makine ruhu. Seberian kim?"
languages.original_text: "Answer me, machine spirit of the genetic guardian. Who is Seberian?"

traits.locale_text: "Cevap ver genetik muhafızın makine ruhu. Seberian kim?"

languages.text: 「遺伝子守護霊よ、答えてくれ。シベリアは誰だ？」
languages.original_text: "Answer me, spirit of the genetic guardian. Who is Seberian?"

traits.locale_text: 「遺伝子守護霊よ、答えてくれ。シベリアは誰だ？」

languages.text: "Antwortet mir, Maschinengeist des genetischen Wächters. Wer ist Seberian?"
languages.original_text: "Answer me, machine spirit of the genetic guardian. Who is Seberian?"

traits.locale_text: "Antwortet mir, Maschinengeist des genetischen Wächters. Wer ist Seberian?"
